steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “just one example of the rich history of Black journalism in the United States” tells us the passage is pivoting from Cunningham's individual story to Black journalism's broader history as the main topic.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice D names both elements: Black journalism has an important history in the US, and NABJ helps honor it.

A, B, and C either misstate the passage (wrong founding year), expand beyond its scope (countries outside the US), or introduce unsupported ideas (Cunningham being overlooked elsewhere).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
